parameter-profiles.note: Includes 1 new ASHRAE G36 parameter_spec plus existing performance specs.

notes: 13 reviewed ASHRAE G36 entries were backfilled under hvac:chiller.
9 entries were deferred: wrong KO type, multi-chunk evidence unsupported by current fixture builder, or no boiler/hot-water-plant class in current sw_base_model ontology.

A pre-existing trust filter semantic issue was observed: min_trust_level=L3 excludes L4 because current ranking logic treats the value as an upper bound. Smoke used default trust filter to verify type exposure.
